message:
✨ Add unified Dashboard tab to GPU Reservations page (#903)

Adds a new "Dashboard" tab to the existing GPU Reservations page with
full unified card features: resizable cards via ellipsis menu, add/remove
cards, localStorage persistence, and 12-column responsive grid layout.

- GPU Namespace Allocations card placed first (top left)
- All 8 GPU cards rendered with proper human-readable titles
- Cards use CardWrapper with onRemove, onWidthChange, cardWidth props
- Data model upgraded from string[] to {type, width}[] with migration
- Added gpu_namespace_allocations to CARD_TITLES registry

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

   gpu_utilization: 'GPU Utilization',
   gpu_usage_trend: 'GPU Usage Trend',
+  gpu_namespace_allocations: 'GPU Namespace Allocations',
   hardware_health: 'Hardware Health',
